slots.name: eyebrow
slots.notes: Small label above the main title. e.g. 'Frequently Asked Questions'

slots.name: section_subtitle
slots.notes: Short supporting description for the main title

slots.name: questions
slots.notes: List of questions: { question, answer, category? }. Recommended 6-10 items.

slots.name: categories
slots.notes: List of question categories (for group categorization): String[]

slots.name: support_cta
slots.notes: CTA to contact advanced support if answer is not found

slots.name: illustration
slots.notes: FAQ illustration (2D flat, 3D render, or vector)

slots.name: search_enabled
slots.notes: Toggle quick search bar for questions

slots.name: background_graphic
slots.notes: Background vector graphic component (e.g. neon lightning, mesh grid)

layout_variants.name: Single Column Centered Accordion
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Vertically stacked question rows (gap-4) centered in a single refined column (max-w-3xl) on a dark Slate background (#0B0F19). Each accordion row features a title wrapped in a slightly rounded glassmorphic border with 10% opacity (backdrop-blur bg-slate-950/45 border border-white/5). Uses `[Heading Font]` for questions and `[Body Font]` for answers. A brand-colored chevron arrow icon sits on the right as an accent. Entrance Animation: Step 1: Title container slides up. Step 2: Question cards reveal from top to bottom with a 50ms stagger. Scroll Reverse: Cards slide vertically down. Hover: Question title borders transition to light green. Click: Answer layer expands smoothly (0 -> auto).

layout_variants.name: Illustration & Search Column Split (Ref 1)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Symmetric 2-column layout (50% left / 50% right) on a pure white or warm cream background. Left column contains a large headline in dark navy `[Heading Font]`, a smooth light grey search bar styled in a deep-rounded oval box (`rounded-full`), and an accordion list separated by ultra-thin horizontal dividers. Right column features a large, vibrant 2D illustration of characters interacting with giant 'FAQ' letters. Entrance & Scroll Animation: When scrolled into view, the right-side illustration slides gently from right to left, pulsing with a slow floating effect. The left-side heading letters reveal line-by-line using the `LineReveal` component. Scroll Reverse: Illustration slides back to the right and fades out. Search Interaction: Non-matching questions fade out and contract in height, revealing matching results smoothly.

layout_variants.name: Bolt Neon Thunderbolt & Categorized Groups (Ref 2)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): High-energy flat layout on a dark warm cream background. Features a giant neon yellow vector thunderbolt graphic overlaying and slicing diagonally across a massive, bold `[Display Geometric Font]` title. Below, questions are grouped clearly by Categorized Groups (e.g. Group 1, Group 2, Group 3) separated by small bold group titles. Questions are presented as flat white rectangular cards with a small black circular button containing a white plus sign (`+`) on the right. Entrance & Scroll Animation: The neon lightning background automatically draws its path diagonally (SVG stroke draw) tracing the scroll position, while the title and accordion groups slide up sequentially with a 60ms stagger. Scroll Reverse: Lightning stroke retracts, and cards slide downward. Plus Button Hover: Rotates slightly and scales 1.1x, while card borders glow with a soft neon yellow.

layout_variants.name: Editorial Single Card Container (Ref 3)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Premium magazine-style minimalist design. Centered main title uses unique typographic contrast: 'You ask? We' in bold, crisp sans-serif `[Heading Font]`, and 'answer' in romantic, italic `[Accent Serif Font]`. The entire accordion list is packed inside a single large white card container with ultra-smooth deep drop shadows and soft rounded corners. Inside, questions are separated by thread-thin grey dividers with a clean plus sign (`+`) at the end of each row. Entrance & Scroll Animation: The large card scales up slightly (scale: 0.96 -> 1.0) and fades in on scroll, followed by lines drawing horizontally and questions revealing in sequence. Scroll Reverse: Card scales down slightly and fades out. Expand Interaction: Plus sign rotates 45 degrees, transforming smoothly into a close sign (`x`).

layout_variants.name: CTA Card Left & Accordion Right (Ref 4)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Asymmetric 2-column layout (40% left / 60% right). Left side contains a compact CTA Card with the subtitle 'Have Any Questions?', a short description in `[Body Font]`, and a vibrant flat-rounded green 'Contact us' button. Right side features a list of smooth light grey accordion rows, each question starting with a circular grey question mark (`?`) icon and ending with a down chevron. Entrance & Scroll Animation: Left CTA column slides in from the left edge, and the right accordion column slides up in a staggered manner. Each question row slides up smoothly mapped to its individual ScrollTrigger scrub within the `ScrollReveal` component. Scroll Reverse: Both columns slide back to the edges and fade out. Contact us Hover: Button springs with mechanical feedback, and a small arrow icon slides horizontally.

layout_variants.name: Cyber Futuristic Outline & Neon Glow (Ref 5)
layout_variants.description: Visual Design (UI Aesthetics): Futuristic/Cyberpunk aesthetic on a deep dark grey-blue background. Left column displays a giant vertically stacked outline/stroke text in neon green: 'FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS'. Right column contains accordion rows in light uppercase `[Mono Font]`, fading neon green into the dark background, with expand buttons styled as thin neon circular outlines containing a small plus sign. Entrance & Scroll Animation: Left outline text flickers with a neon breathing effect. Right accordion rows slide from right to left in sequence mapped to ScrollTrigger. Scroll Reverse: Rows slide back right and dim. Hover: Question text glows neon green and the circular button rotates 90 degrees.

line_reveal_header.intent: Heading text reveals line-by-line (LineReveal component) on scroll: Splits text into words grouped by browser offsetTop, sliding up gently (y: 24px -> 0px) and fading in from opacity 0.1 to 1.0 based on scroll position. Scroll reverse: Slides back down and fades out.

spec.type: gsap ScrollTrigger scrub per offsetTop row

staggered_accordion_reveals.intent: Accordion question rows slide up in a staggered sequence from the bottom to create a smooth transition.

illustration_entrance.intent: Right-column illustration slides in from the right edge, scaling up slightly from its center with a floating animation.

thunderbolt_path_draw.intent: Draws neon yellow lightning vector strokes across the background, tracing actual scroll position.

sticky_left_column.intent: Sticky pins the left-side title column via CSS position sticky at top: 12svh, allowing it to float smoothly in parallel with the long right-side question list on scroll.

scroll_reveal_faq_items.intent: Scroll reveal for individual question cards (ScrollReveal component): Each card is controlled by its own ScrollTrigger, sliding from y: 30px to 0px and increasing opacity from 0.2 to 1.0 based on scroll scrub. Scroll reverse: Card slides back down and fades out.

spec.type: gsap ScrollTrigger scrub per item wrapper

accordion_expand_height.intent: Answer expand animation: Clicking to open/close questions smoothly animates the answer container height from 0 to 'auto' over 250ms, with text content fading in simultaneously to prevent layout jumps. Closing collapses the height to 0 smoothly.

plus_icon_rotate_45.intent: Plus icon rotation: Plus (+) rotates 45 degrees to transform into a close (x) when expanded, and rotates back when collapsed over 200ms with easeOut.

chevron_icon_rotate_180.intent: Chevron arrow icon on the right rotates 180 degrees clockwise on expand and reverses back to 0 degrees on collapse over 200ms.

search_filter_fade.intent: On user search, non-matching questions fade out to opacity: 0 and collapse height to 0px over 200ms to neatly show only matched results.

item_neon_glow_hover.intent: Cyberpunk-style hover on question lines: Text glows neon and card background opacity increases slightly over 150ms.

illustration_float_tilt.intent: Right column illustration floats automatically on the Y-axis using CSS keyframes, tilting in 3D based on cursor coordinates.

cyber_neon_flicker.intent: Outline/stroke left heading text flickers with a neon glow, mimicking an artistic faulty electric sign.

in.description: FAQ usually shares the background color with pricing or is slightly lighter.

out.description: Fades into the CTA banner — typically CTA has a very different background color.

flow.notes: FAQ reduces customer hesitation before leaving the page. Positioned after pricing to resolve pricing-related inquiries.
